raw_text: This service outage has been going on way too long. It started last month when I tried to transfer money and got an error message. I thought maybe it was temporary so I waited a few hours and tried again but same problem. I contacted support and they confirmed there was a system issue but said they didnt have an ETA for the fix. Meanwhile im missing payment deadlines and getting late fees. Your company needs to fix this immediately and compensate customers for the inconvenience.
